description: Style Note Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this sandal from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it and pair it with jeans and casual T-shirts for unparalleled cool. Product Details Round toed slip on sandals Thong styled leather upper with padding Soft footbed with leather stripes and branding Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with multi directional lugs Material and Care Fabric and leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain the shine
